element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Real-time collision-based melee against insects and small enemies
Progressive stat growth through combat encounters
Item collection and gear swapping across inventory
Quest information, lore delivery, trading with villagers
Navigation through enclosed spaces with escalating enemy density
Pattern recognition and sustained combat against named adversaries
Supplementary offensive and defensive options beyond sword
Final dungeon; requires Felicia's assistance to access
Narrative climax; confrontation with Zerah and ultimate threat

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching towns with NPCs and shops
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic town-to-dungeon cycle with escalating danger toward Lagoon Castle confrontation; early game emphasizes exploration and leveling, mid-game introduces environmental threats, late-game focuses on final confrontation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Non-linear town and landscape exploration encouraging revisits to access previously blocked areas with new abilities

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction with weak insect enemies and basic sword mechanics; towns provide safe rest areas and information gathering
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive enemy scaling in dungeons; introduction of varied enemy types and first major boss encounters; equipment upgrades become essential
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained danger in Lagoon Castle; final boss and Evil Spirit confrontation; reliance on accumulated levels, equipment, and learned patterns
notable_spikes: Zerah and Evil Spirit final confrontation

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe town areas serve as information and resource hubs between dangerous dungeon expeditions; NPCs provide quest direction and dialogue; shops enable equipment management
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic town to nearby dungeon progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Muddy water and polluted rivers/lakes serve as environmental storytelling; clean water areas represent safety, corrupted areas signal danger and Zerah's influence
Lagoon Castle lifted into clouds serves as unreachable late-game goal; narrative design emphasizes vertical aspiration and eventual ascent to final confrontation
Felicia's power required to open Secret Place and move Lagoon Castle; certain areas locked behind story progression and NPC assistance
